response.justification: Bogdan is exceptionally overqualified for this junior/mid-level role. As a current Staff Engineer with 15+ years of experience across the full tech stack, he possesses mastery of every required technology and several nice-to-haves. However, this creates a critical retention risk—he would likely become disengaged in an entry-level position and quickly pursue more senior opportunities. His background indicates he seeks growth, architectural challenges, and leadership; this role offers none of those.
strengths: Mastery of entire required tech stack: TypeScript, React, Node.js, relational databases, AWS, and Kubernetes
Proven ability to build pragmatic, production-grade solutions across web, mobile, and infrastructure at scale
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) that align with stated company values
concerns: Severe overqualification creates substantial retention risk; Staff Engineer in junior role will likely disengage or leave quickly
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed in skill set, though SQL mastery and multi-database experience suggest quick ramp-up
Pattern of shorter tenure at each company (1-3 years) raises questions about long-term commitment and fit for established team
